description: N circular icon badges (or labelled figures) pop in one by one on a ring/grid — the 'evidence/candidate' currency, or a roster of examples.
whenToUse: A roster/set beat where several items or examples are shown building up (5 largest groups, a set of traits, candidate icons).
generalize: The badge subjects + labels + count are SLOTS; the ring/grid layout + pop-in are fixed. Each badge REQUIRES its own image.
produces: one gpt-image-2 icon per badge -> rembg -> IconBuild pops them in with labels.
styleLock: Badges are gpt-image-2 icons (required assets — never substitute); labels are gpt-image-2 lettering.
rules: Every badge MUST have its own image (fail loudly if missing).
Badges pop in on their startWord.
